# Tycoons Investments

Tycoons Investments is an AI-assisted real estate inventory website for Egypt.

Main site:
https://tycoons-inv.de/

Core purpose:
- Help users search developer inventory by voice or text.
- Show relevant property cards from live inventory.
- Convert qualified interest directly to WhatsApp.

Contact:
WhatsApp +201200704344

Important indexable pages:
- https://tycoons-inv.de/
- https://tycoons-inv.de/projects/
- https://tycoons-inv.de/areas/new-cairo/
- https://tycoons-inv.de/areas/north-coast/
- https://tycoons-inv.de/areas/ain-sokhna/
- https://tycoons-inv.de/property-types/ivilla/
- https://tycoons-inv.de/property-types/chalet/
- https://tycoons-inv.de/property-types/apartment/

- https://tycoons-inv.de/developers/palm-hills/
- https://tycoons-inv.de/developers/la-vista/
- https://tycoons-inv.de/developers/tatweer-misr/
- https://tycoons-inv.de/developers/direction-white/
